fixes.title: Fix non-www to www redirect (780ms penalty on mobile)
fixes.details: verociousmotorsports.com redirects to www.verociousmotorsports.com costing 780ms on mobile. Fix at DNS/CDN level — either enforce www via CNAME/A record so there's no redirect, or use Cloudflare/CDN page rule for instant redirect.

fixes.title: Convert MOBILE LCP element from CSS background-image to
fixes.verification_notes: Desktop LCP is ALREADY optimized (img.home-slide-image-lcp with fetchpriority=high). Only MOBILE needs this fix.
fixes.details: Mobile LCP element is div.home-infoblock.home-infoblock0 with CSS background-image url('/site/img/Backgrounds/vms_homethumb_tubing_v3.jpg'). Convert to with fetchpriority='high'. Desktop hero already uses proper tag.

fixes.title: Add <link rel="preload"> for mobile LCP image
fixes.verification_notes: ALREADY IMPLEMENTED - Found preload for both desktop (UltimateFabWarehouse_top_backdrop.webp) and mobile (vms_homethumb_tubing_v3.jpg) LCP images
fixes.details: Preloads ARE present in <head>. No action needed.

fixes.title: Remove old GA4 direct integration (G-MDZKSYLJ1B)
fixes.verification_notes: EXACT LOCATION FOUND in NetSuite backend
fixes.estimated_savings: ~153 KiB JS removed, ~100ms+ main thread saved
fixes.netsuite_path: Commerce > Websites > Configuration > Integrations > Google Analytics 4
fixes.action: Clear this field and click Save
fixes.details: Old GA4 property loading independent gtag.js on every page. G-862KMNBJX6 is active property managed through GTM. Simply clear the GA4 ID field in NetSuite Integrations panel.

fixes.title: Remove client-side Facebook Pixel (fbevents.js)
fixes.verification_notes: Facebook Pixel NOT in NetSuite native config (ENABLE unchecked, APPLICATION ID empty). fbevents.js is loading via GTM or hardcoded script. Server-side CAPI fully handles all 7 events.
fixes.estimated_savings: 93 KiB JS removed, 131ms main thread saved
fixes.details: Facebook Pixel is NOT coming from NetSuite native integration. Check for hardcoded fbevents.js base code in shopping.ssp or look in GTM for any direct pixel initialization outside of Stape tags. The 7 Stape Meta DT tags in client GTM should be KEPT (they feed server-side CAPI).

fixes.title: Consolidate Google scripts — remove individual gtag.js calls
fixes.verification_notes: Treemap confirms 4 separate Google scripts loading: gtm.js (keep), gtag.js G-MDZKSYLJ1B (remove via fix-004), gtag.js G-862KMNBJX6 (should fire via GTM only), gtag.js AW-11060543839 (should fire via GTM only)
fixes.details: After removing old GA4 (fix-004), check if G-862KMNBJX6 and AW-11060543839 are loading as standalone gtag.js scripts. GTM container already has OFM Google Tag for GA4 and Google Ads tag — standalone scripts are redundant.

fixes.title: Defer Klaviyo SDK loading
fixes.verification_notes: 16 Klaviyo scripts found loading on page. GTM has 7 Klaviyo tags including SDK Loader on Initialization - All Pages trigger.
fixes.details: Change Klaviyo SDK Loader trigger to fire after window.load + 3s delay using Custom Event. 7 Klaviyo tags: SDK Loader, Add To Cart, Newsletter Signup, Placed Order, Started Checkout, Viewed Product, Email Identifier.

fixes.title: Defer Bing Ads scripts
fixes.verification_notes: 3 Bing Ads Custom HTML tags confirmed in GTM
fixes.gtm_location: GTM-57T4T5BW > Tags > BingAds LoadScript, Pageview Tracking, Conversion
fixes.details: Change BingAds LoadScript trigger to fire on Window Loaded or with delay.

fixes.title: Fix cookie consent banner CLS (position: fixed)
fixes.verification_notes: ALREADY FIXED - Cookie banner (cookieconsent-overlay-dark) has position:fixed confirmed in live DOM inspection
fixes.details: NO ACTION NEEDED. Cookie consent banner already has position:fixed. Default display:none (hidden until triggered).

fixes.title: Add <link rel="preconnect"> hints
fixes.verification_notes: CONFIRMED MISSING - Zero preconnects found in DOM inspection
fixes.details: Add preconnect hints to shopping.ssp and checkout.ssp <head> immediately after <meta charset>.

fixes.title: Add font-display: swap to @font-face rules
fixes.verification_notes: Google Fonts configured in NetSuite: Commerce > Configuration > Summit Theme > Web Fonts > Google Families: Droid+Sans:400,700, Open+Sans:400,600,700,800
fixes.netsuite_path: Commerce > Websites > Configuration > Summit Theme > Web Fonts
fixes.details: Add font-display: swap to all @font-face declarations. For Google Fonts, add &display=swap to the URL in NetSuite Web Fonts configuration.

fixes.title: Fix shopping_5.js minification in SCA build
fixes.verification_notes: Treemap shows shopping_5.js at 335.5 KiB (16% of total)
fixes.details: Run gulp deploy with production minification enabled. Check distro.json for uglify/terser config.

fixes.title: Increase cache TTL from 2hrs to 1yr for versioned assets
fixes.details: All first-party JS/CSS/fonts cached for only 2 hours. Files have ?t=timestamp cache busters. Set Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable. May require NetSuite support ticket or CDN config.

fixes.title: Inline critical CSS and lazy-load shopping_5.css
fixes.details: shopping_5.css is 204 KiB with 188 KiB (92%) unused on homepage. Extract ~16 KiB critical CSS, inline in <head>, lazy-load rest.

fixes.title: Preload critical fonts (DroidSans, OpenSans)
fixes.details: DroidSans.woff2 (58 KiB), DroidSans-Bold.woff2 (61 KiB), OpenSans-SemiBold.woff2 (43 KiB). Add <link rel=preload as=font type=font/woff2 crossorigin> in <head>.

fixes.title: [CHECKOUT] Fix reCAPTCHA loading 4 times
fixes.verification_notes: BluePoint.ReCaptcha extension confirmed in tech stack
fixes.details: reCAPTCHA loaded 4 times on checkout — twice blocking, twice async. Bug in BluePoint.ReCaptcha extension. Deduplicate to one async load.

fixes.title: [CHECKOUT] Set main-container min-height in CSS
fixes.details: div#main-container has min-height:315px set via JS after render. Hardcode in CSS. Also reserve space for reCAPTCHA widget.

fixes.title: [CHECKOUT] Add defer to checkout body scripts
fixes.details: checkout.js (438 KiB), checkout-templates_5.js (267 KiB), checkout_5.js (172 KiB), cms.js (52 KiB) all sync. Test defer carefully in staging.

already_implemented.title: LCP image preloads
already_implemented.notes: Both desktop and mobile LCP images have preload hints in <head>

already_implemented.title: Cookie consent banner position:fixed
already_implemented.notes: Cookie banner already has position:fixed, default display:none
